name: OpenClaw Companion Hook
description: Automatically pushes OpenClaw agent working status to the OpenClaw Companion desktop pet via HTTP API

apiUrl.description: OpenClaw Companion HTTP API endpoint for status push

throttleMs.description: Minimum interval (ms) between consecutive pushes to avoid flooding

idleTimeoutMs.description: After this many ms with no activity, push 'sleeping' state (5 min default)

enabled.description: Master toggle to enable/disable the hook
